name: Chocolate Peanut Clusters
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Shortening (do not use butter, margarine or oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small microwave-safe bowl, place the milk chocolate chips, semi-sweet chocolate chips and shortening.
2. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes, or until the chips are melted and the mixture is smooth when stirred.
3. Stir in the peanuts.
4. Drop by teaspoonfuls into 1-inch diameter candy or petit four papers.
5. Allow to set until firm.
6. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place. About 2 dozen candies.
